name: DRAFT Inc.
summary: Draft Inc. provides design services related to space creation. The company is involved in office design, shop design, layout and space planning and execution, commercial building brand consulting, office relocation, and consulting for new project; furniture design, layout and space planning and execution, equipment and interior design; and import, export, and sale of furniture, office furniture, and accessories. It also offers website strategy management support, graphic design, advertisement design, and 3D and 2D design services. The company provides its commercial space design services for hotels and mixed-use buildings, architectural design, and product design. Draft Inc. was founded in 2008 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
